<user_query>

</user_query>

Creating a file listing 1990s HBO shows. Checking the PBS file format and gathering a comprehensive list.

[REDACTED]

input.explanation: Find a reliable list of HBO shows that aired in the 1990s to populate the file accurately.
Fetch Wikipedia's HBO programming list to build a comprehensive 1990s show list with dates.

input.search_term: HBO The Adventures of Tintin 1990s original
input.explanation: Confirm co-productions and other HBO 90s series not fully listed in the former tables.

input.search_term: site:wikipedia.org HBO original animated series list 1990s
input.explanation: Find additional HBO animated or other series from the 1990s for the list.

content.text:
Creating `hbo-shows-1990s.txt` in the same spirit as the PBS list: comprehensive coverage from Wikipedia's HBO programming tables plus well-documented co-productions (e.g., Tintin, Babar) that aired on HBO in the U.S. during the 1990s.

[REDACTED]

input.contents:
HBO shows that aired during the 1990s (1990–1999)
==================================================

Scope: Series, anthology programs, recurring sports franchises, and HBO original
miniseries or documentary strands that had U.S. HBO airings overlapping 1990–1999.
This follows the same practical limit as similar lists: it aims to be broad and
accurate using published program-lineup sources, not a claim to every licensed
movie, one-off special, or regional variant ever shown.

Sources consulted: English Wikipedia "List of programs broadcast by HBO" (and
related articles for co-productions such as The Adventures of Tintin and Babar),
cross-checked for 1990s overlap.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DRAMA
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Oz (premiered 1997)
The Sopranos (premiered 1999)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
COMEDY (SCRIPTED SERIES)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Not Necessarily the News (ended 1990)
1st & Ten (ended 1991)
Encyclopedia Brown (ended 1990)
The Kids in the Hall (co-production with CBC; through 1995)
The Baby-Sitters Club (1990)
Dream On (1990–1996)
Hardcore TV (1992–1994)
The Larry Sanders Show (1992–1998)
Mr. Show with Bob and David (1995–1998)
Arliss (from 1996)
The High Life (1996)
Tracey Takes On... (1996–1999)
Tenacious D (1997–2000)
Sex and the City (from 1998)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MINISERIES & LIMITED SERIES (YEAR AIRED IN THE 1990s)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sessions (1991)
Laurel Avenue (1993)
From the Earth to the Moon (1998)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ANTHOLOGY & HORROR / SCI-FI ANTHOLOGY
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tales from the Crypt (through 1996)
Lifestories: Families in Crisis (1992–1996)
Hotel Room (1993)
Perversions of Science (1997)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ANIMATION — ADULT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spicy City (1997)
Todd McFarlane's Spawn (1997–1999)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ANIMATION — KIDS & FAMILY (INCLUDES CO-PRODUCTIONS COMMONLY CARRIED BY HBO U.S.)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HBO Storybook Musicals (through 1994)
The Adventures of Tintin (co-production; U.S. HBO 1991–1992)
Babar (co-production; U.S. HBO in era; series continued into the 1990s)
Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales for Every Child (from 1995)
The Little Lulu Show (1995–1999)
The Neverending Story (1995–1996)
Tales from the Neverending Story (from 1996)
The Adventures of Paddington Bear (from 1998)
The Country Mouse and the City Mouse Adventures (from 1998)
A Little Curious (1998–2000)
Crashbox (from 1999)
30 by 30: Kid Flicks (from 1999)
Anthony Ant (1999)
George and Martha (1999–2000)
Rainbow Fish (from 1999)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DOCUMENTARY & UNSCRIPTED STRANDS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
America Undercover (strand; through 2006)
Real Sex (from 1992)
Autopsy (from 1994)
Taxicab Confessions (from 1995)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIETY, STAND-UP & MUSIC
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
One Night Stand (1989–2005; 1990s run)
Def Comedy Jam (from 1992)
Dennis Miller Live (1994–2002)
HBO Comedy Half-Hour (1994–1999)
The Chris Rock Show (1997–2000)
Reverb (1997–2001)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SPORTS (RECURRING ORIGINAL / LICENSED HBO SPORTS FRANCHISES ACTIVE IN THE 1990s)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HBO World Championship Boxing (through 2018)
Wimbledon (HBO tennis coverage through 1999)
Inside the NFL (through 2008)
Race for the Pennant (through 1992)
Real Sports with Bryant Gumbel (from 1995)
Boxing After Dark (from 1996)

input.search_term: Babar TV series HBO United States broadcast
input.explanation: Verify Babar aired on HBO in the U.S. during the 1990s before keeping it in the list.

content.text:
Here’s what I added.

**New file:** `hbo-shows-1990s.txt` in your repo root.

It mirrors the style of `pbs-shows-1990s.txt`: a short scope note, then sections for **drama, comedy, miniseries, anthology, animation (adult + kids/family), documentary strands, variety, and sports**—all chosen so their **HBO run overlaps 1990–1999**.

The list is built from Wikipedia’s HBO former-programming tables plus a few well-documented U.S. HBO co-productions (e.g. **The Adventures of Tintin**, **Babar**) that don’t always appear in the same table row. A literally exhaustive catalog of every HBO movie, special, and regional feed isn’t practical; the header states that explicitly, same idea as your PBS file.

If you want the file to include **only** series from Wikipedia’s tables (and drop Tintin/Babar), or to add **movies / stand-alone specials**, say how you’d like it scoped and we can adjust.

[REDACTED]
